actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke Inventory.ToggleVisibility() to simulate GvrController.AppButtonUp and cover the 'show' branch. MonoBehaviour component id=985 is the Inventory script (m_Script guid=3652d147b24254c618ce4989e3b9003c, type=3) attached to GameObject fileID=94. Requires a CanvasGroup on the same GameObject to avoid NullReference.

Manually invoke Inventory.ToggleVisibility() again to cover the 'hide' branch and verify CanvasGroup.alpha toggles back and blocksRaycasts is reset. Same MonoBehaviour id=985 (guid=3652d147b24254c618ce4989e3b9003c).
